required_preferences.fact: Now proactively seeks new clients to maintain at least six active clients at all times — immediately pursues new leads when roster drops below six

supersedes.fact: Never takes on more than six active clients simultaneously, even when approached by new prospects

required_preferences.fact: Replaces running with prescribed low-impact physical therapy exercises indoors — never runs or performs high-impact cardio

supersedes.fact: Always runs outdoors, even in winter — never uses a treadmill or indoor track

required_preferences.fact: Preps a tailored agenda for every client meeting, avoids generic templates
Spends robotics club evenings in the school lobby reading or handling light client emails while waiting for her daughter’s session to end
Books therapy sessions monthly, schedules them well in advance rather than waiting for stressful periods
Avoids extending credit terms to new clients out of heightened concern for timely payments

persona: A freelance financial consultant with clients across multiple industries
